top_signals.title: Oil Erases Gain as Traders Weigh Fallout From US-Iran Strikes
top_signals.summary: Oil erased gains as traders weighed the outlook for peace talks over the Iran war after a brief US military campaign against the Islamic Republic following the downing of an American helicopter.

alerts.title: ‘AI is not killing all these jobs’: LinkedIn boss on UK hiring slump
alerts.summary: Hiring in the capital is down 32 per cent from January 2019, a steeper fall than in any other region tracked by LinkedIn, as higher interest rates and corporate cost-cutting weigh on firms that dominate London’s labour market. Across the UK, hiring has slowed by 24 per cent on pre-pandemic levels and 10 per cent [...]
